article_meta.title: Sign up for Executive Dysfunction, a weekly newsletter that surfaces under-the-radar stories about what Trump is doing t

reasoning: Mostly solid identification of bias in the author’s prose, but includes one clear attribution violation by flagging language attributed to Eugene Fidell, and misses a couple of additional loaded phrases in the author’s setup.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Incorrectly flagged 'a flagrant abuse of office,' which is explicitly attributed to Fidell, not the author.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: One flagged item is not author bias due to attribution; the other items are defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-level loaded phrasing such as 'of course,' 'freewheeling authority,' and 'will only end on his say-so.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For correctly identified author prose, labels like Spin and Opinion-as-Fact are appropriate and defensible.
